channel.title: San Antonio on Hart Hoover
channel.description: Recent content in San Antonio on Hart Hoover

item.title: Thoughts on the 2018 SATechTrek
item.author: hart.hoover@gmail.com (Hart Hoover)
item.description: The San Antonio tech ecosystem is better than ever, but still has a long way to go. I saw lots of great demos, talked to really smart people, and there’s a lot to celebrate. However, there are some things that I’m still concerned about for the immediate future, and there are a few ways I think the event can be even better in 2019.

item.title: Top 15 San Antonio Coffee Shops
item.author: hart.hoover@gmail.com (Hart Hoover)
item.description: The Alamo City Moms Blog has a great post up on coffee shops in San Antonio. Several posts on ASpoonfulOf.Coffee have been made in these shops. Worth a read! http://alamocity.citymomsblog.com/2015/03/24/top-15-san-antonio-coffee-shops/
